hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing data and case workflows to maintain a complete audit trail for cross-border transfers compliant with multi-jurisdictional requirements.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule evidence becomes hard to trace
problem_description: Cross-border Travel Rule data often remains scattered across multiple providers and systems, making it difficult for compliance teams to maintain a clear audit trail. This fragmentation slows down case reviews and weakens the ability to demonstrate regulatory review readiness for complex transfers.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates originator, beneficiary, provider outputs, routing status and exception data into structured cases with linked audit evidence to support clearer, traceable cross-border Travel Rule reviews.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exception to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages Travel Rule exceptions by routing incomplete or high-risk messages into cases, preserving audit evidence and supporting compliance review for cross-border transfers.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule tool. One evidence-ready workflow
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into a single workflow layer without replacing existing providers or message routing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing cross-border transfers by preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling controlled workflows with secure access and enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status and cases into one operational workflow for VASPs and digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exception cases for review, linking incomplete or failed Travel Rule events with wallet, transaction and customer data for thorough compliance investigation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case records and supporting evidence, creating an audit-ready trail of Travel Rule message reviews and compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing Travel Rule providers by connecting their outputs into connected case management and compliance workflows without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases and evidence for clearer operational control.
final_title: Preserve Travel Rule evidence for cross-border audits
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing data and case workflows into audit-ready evidence for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
